name: Integration - Error Handling and Fallback Response
description: Checks that when the retrieval or LLM fails, the fallback response is returned and error is logged.
input: Simulate a failure in RetrievalClient.retrieve_chunks or LLMClient.generate_answer during process_question.
output: Fallback response string is returned to the user.
success_criteria: Error is logged at error level
error_scenarios: Unexpected exception in retrieval or LLM
